stemHtml: The effect of ram air on the operation of a gas turbine engine is:

options.a: a lower efficiency of the engine with an increase in aeroplane speed.
options.b: an increase in the efficiency of the engine.
options.c: an increase in the indicated airspeed (IAS) at which the aeroplane should be flown for optimum range.
options.d: an increase in the engine rpm for take-off.
